problem id: 0440e6ab
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00101101 -> 10100000
  00001011 -> 01100000
  11011000 -> 00000001
  00111000 -> 00000000
  11110100 -> 10000001
  10001110 -> 11000001
  01001000 -> 00000000
  00101111 -> 11100000

query: 01110011
predicted answer: 01100000
